pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates buyportfolio.csv with AAPL as the target Code/Symbol.
setup_task.sh sets the Date field for AAPL to "Jan 15, 2024".
setup_task.sh sets the Purchase Price for AAPL to "185.2".
setup_task.sh sets the Units for AAPL to "100.0".
verifier.py checks for two AAPL rows with units = 50.0 each.
verifier.py checks for "long term hold" in the comment of one lot.
verifier.py checks for "short term trade" in the comment of the second lot.
setup_task.sh defines PORTFOLIO_DIR and creates buyportfolio.csv at this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data from setup_task.sh. The portfolio at /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/portfolios/My Portfolio/buyportfolio.csv is created with 100.0 units of AAPL purchased on Jan 15, 2024, at a price of 185.2. Verifier.py confirms the user splits this into two 50.0 unit lots with comments "Long Term Hold" and "Short Term Trade".
